text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having heard that today's training would be
indoors due to a storm, Air Groove heads to the
training center.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suppose we can't control the weather.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But it really is coming down... The track must be
nothing more than a muddy pool by now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I wonder how the pansies in the plaza are doing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I only just planted them. They'll never sprout at
this rate...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's not a moment to lose. I need to put a
sheet out and protect those seeds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Air Groove manages to protect the
flower bed, she doesn't make it to training in
time...
